## Dirty URL

Paste a real or realistic URL that PlainLink currently leaves too dirty.

## Expected Clean URL

Show the URL PlainLink should produce.

## Parameters To Remove

List the exact parameter names that should be removed.

## Why They Are Tracking-Related

Explain how you know these parameters are tracking, attribution, sharing, analytics, or click identifiers.

## Required Parameters That Must Stay

List any parameters that are needed for the page, invite, checkout, download, or redirect to keep working.

## Notes
